description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a hip roof, featuring weathered brown planks and a corrugated metal extension on one side. The main structure has three evenly spaced rectangular windows on the front, framed in dark wood, and a brick chimney protruding from the roof. The side extension is clad in green, aged metal panels, with a single wooden door and a small window. The roof is made of wooden planks, showing signs of age and discoloration, and the base of the cabin is bordered with a patterned trim. The windows are simple and unadorned, and the overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, rural dwelling. The cabin sits low to the ground and appears solidly constructed, suitable for use in a modest urban or peri-urban neighborhood.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a hip roof, brown plank walls, and a green metal side extension, featuring multiple rectangular windows and a brick chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing three rectangular windows, brown wooden planks, and the main hip roof with a visible brick chimney.
description_view_1: Side view with two windows, the hip roof, and the chimney; the patterned trim at the base is visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the green metal extension, a single window, and the main cabin's three front windows.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the green metal extension with a single wooden door and a small window, plus the back of the main cabin.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with wooden planks and a brick chimney, moderate overhangs, no dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: Five rectangular windows: three symmetrically grouped on the front facade, one on the left side, and one small window on the green metal extension at the rear; all windows are similarly sized and framed in dark wood.
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the rear side of the green metal extension, offset to the left when viewed from the back.
